title: SpiritChat
body:
# SpiritChat | Beta
SpiritChat is a new-generation chat formatting plugin aimed toward providing a simple, flexible and feature-packed experience when setting up your server's chat 

## Beta
As this plugin is very new, it is not as feature-packed as it's planned to be yet. The goal is to ensure each feature is as stable as possible before moving on to other features. So keep in mind as you are using this plugin, there can be bugs and missing features.

## Wiki
For more information on the plugin, please visit the wiki!

[https://spiritchat.lmao.software/](https://spiritchat.lmao.software/)

##   Planned Content
This plugin has huge aspirations to become an all-in-one solution for chat management. 
- Social System
  - Private Messages
  - PM Toggle
  - Social-Spy
  - Ignoring
- Staff Chat
  - Multi-Server Support
    - Bungee/Velocity Support [Limited]
    - Redis Support [Preferred]
- Staff Notifications
  - Join Notification
  - Leave Notification
  - Server Switch Notification
- Server Monitor
  - Notify when a server shuts down, starts up, and is lagging
